title: pellaea flexuosa
intro: Pellaea flexuosa, also known as flexible fern or Australian sword fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Pellaea flexuosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
